scenario: Lattice Logistics runs a Spring Boot job worker that polls Zeebe for 9000 jobs per day. After upgrading to the Camunda 8.8 starter, the operations engineer needs to migrate the deprecated zeebe.client.job.poll-interval and zeebe.client.job.timeout properties so the worker keeps the same long polling timeout of 30 seconds.
question: Which renaming pair matches the documented replacements for the deprecated zeebe.client.job properties?

options.text: Use camunda.client.worker.defaults.poll-interval as the replacement for zeebe.client.job.poll-interval, and camunda.client.worker.defaults.timeout as the replacement for zeebe.client.job.timeout
Use camunda.client.job.poll-interval as the replacement for zeebe.client.job.poll-interval, and camunda.client.job.timeout as the replacement for zeebe.client.job.timeout under a job namespace

Use camunda.client.worker.poll-interval as the replacement for zeebe.client.job.poll-interval, and camunda.client.worker.timeout as the replacement for zeebe.client.job.timeout without a defaults level
Use camunda.client.message.poll-interval as the replacement for zeebe.client.job.poll-interval, and camunda.client.message.time-to-live as the replacement for zeebe.client.job.timeout

a.text: Correct. The zeebe.client.job table lists camunda.client.worker.defaults.poll-interval (env CAMUNDA_CLIENT_WORKER_DEFAULTS_POLLINTERVAL) as the replacement for zeebe.client.job.poll-interval, and camunda.client.worker.defaults.timeout as the replacement for zeebe.client.job.timeout.

b.text: Incorrect. The replacement namespace is camunda.client.worker.defaults, not camunda.client.job; there is no camunda.client.job group in the table.

c.text: Incorrect. The documented properties live under camunda.client.worker.defaults, not directly under camunda.client.worker; the defaults segment is part of the property path.

d.text: Incorrect. The zeebe.client.message group maps to camunda.client.max-message-size and camunda.client.message-time-to-live; job worker properties move under camunda.client.worker.defaults instead.

explanation: The zeebe.client.job deprecation table maps poll-interval and timeout to camunda.client.worker.defaults.poll-interval and camunda.client.worker.defaults.timeout. The new namespace is the worker defaults section under the unified camunda.client configuration.

docs.title: Camunda Spring Boot starter properties reference
